nodes.label: Imanol Saldana
nodes.description: Software engineer and data analyst with expertise in data governance, SAP systems, and reinforcement learning. Graduate of UT Dallas Computer Science program (Dec 2025).

nodes.label: University of Texas at Dallas
nodes.description: Educational institution where Imanol earned Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. Located in Richardson, TX. Graduation: Dec 2025.

nodes.label: Freeman
nodes.description: Enterprise company where Imanol worked as intern, part-time analyst, and associate analyst. Based in Dallas, TX. Employs Imanol across three roles from May 2025 to present.

nodes.label: Sensori Robotics
nodes.description: Partner organization with University of Texas at Dallas for autonomous robotics research projects.

nodes.label: Associate Data Analyst
nodes.description: Current role at Freeman starting Jan 2026, focusing on data governance, material master data documentation across 4 legacy and S/4HANA systems, and data quality validation.

nodes.label: Data Operations Analyst (Part-Time)
nodes.description: Part-time role at Freeman from Aug 2025 to Jan 2026, managing material master records and automating data validation using Python and pandas.

nodes.label: Master Materials Data Intern
nodes.description: Internship role at Freeman from May 2025 to Aug 2025, designing SAP data fields, leading requirements gathering, and validating S/4HANA migration of 2,000+ records.

nodes.label: Python
nodes.description: Programming language used for data validation, automation, machine learning, and robotics projects. Libraries: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib.

nodes.label: R Programming
nodes.description: Statistical programming language used for data analysis, visualization, and model building. Libraries: ggplot2, tidyverse.

nodes.label: SQL
nodes.description: Database query language used for database systems and data operations. Covered in coursework on Database Systems.

nodes.label: Java
nodes.description: Object-oriented programming language in technical skill set.

nodes.label: C++
nodes.description: Systems programming language in technical skill set.

nodes.label: Pandas
nodes.description: Python data manipulation library used extensively for data validation, cleaning, and automation tasks at Freeman.

nodes.label: NumPy
nodes.description: Python numerical computing library for data analysis and scientific computing.

nodes.label: Matplotlib
nodes.description: Python visualization library for creating data plots and visualizations.

nodes.label: ggplot2
nodes.description: R visualization package used for creating dashboards and geographic visualizations in the housing price project.

nodes.label: tidyverse
nodes.description: R data manipulation and visualization ecosystem used in housing price analysis.

nodes.label: SAP S/4HANA
nodes.description: Enterprise resource planning system. Imanol has hands-on experience designing data fields, migrating 25,000+ material records, and supporting enterprise-wide transformation.

nodes.label: Git
nodes.description: Version control system listed in technical skills and tools.

nodes.label: SQLAlchemy
nodes.description: Python ORM library for database operations and SQL abstraction.

nodes.label: Jupyter
nodes.description: Interactive computational notebook environment used for analysis and documentation.

nodes.label: Unix/Linux
nodes.description: Operating systems and command-line proficiency.

nodes.label: LaTeX
nodes.description: Document preparation system for technical writing and documentation.

nodes.label: Scikit-learn
nodes.description: Python machine learning library used for regression and classification models in the housing price prediction project.

nodes.label: Reinforcement Learning
nodes.description: Machine learning technique used for autonomous robotics navigation with custom reward functions, termination conditions, and policy training.

nodes.label: Isaac Lab/Sim
nodes.description: Physics simulation platform for developing and training reinforcement learning policies for legged ground robots.

nodes.label: Statistical Modeling
nodes.description: Skill in building and evaluating statistical models including regression analysis and classification models.

nodes.label: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Technique for preprocessing and transforming raw data into meaningful features for predictive modeling.

nodes.label: Data Visualization
nodes.description: Creating visual representations of data using tools like ggplot2 and Matplotlib for communicating insights.

nodes.label: Data Governance
nodes.description: Framework for establishing data standards, quality validation, and cross-system data consistency across enterprise systems.

nodes.label: Agile/Scrum
nodes.description: Agile development methodology with participation in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and process improvements.

nodes.label: Autonomous Robotics Navigation Project
nodes.description: Academic capstone project (Aug 2025 - Dec 2025) developing reinforcement learning navigation system for legged ground robot using Isaac Lab/Sim for outdoor edge-following maintenance tasks.

nodes.label: Dallas Crime Effect on Housing Price
nodes.description: Academic data analysis project (Oct 2024) analyzing 20,000+ crime and housing records, building regression/classification models, and creating geographic visualizations using R.
nodes.norm_label: dallas crime effect on housing price

nodes.label: S/4HANA Migration Project
nodes.description: Enterprise data migration project at Freeman involving 25,000+ material records, hierarchy mapping, and data quality validation across sales and supply chain operations.

nodes.label: Material Master Data Documentation
nodes.description: Large-scale documentation initiative at Freeman documenting 100+ material master data attributes across 4 legacy and S/4HANA systems to establish enterprise data governance framework.

nodes.label: Data Validation & Automation Initiative
nodes.description: Python scripting initiative at Freeman to automate data validation and cleaning, identifying and correcting 1,000+ data integrity errors while reducing manual processing time.

nodes.label: SAP Enterprise Data Field Implementation
nodes.description: Project at Freeman intern role designing and implementing new enterprise data field in SAP, integrating with 3+ downstream systems to prevent sales and supply chain mismatches.

nodes.label: Linear Regression
nodes.description: Statistical modeling technique used in Dallas crime and housing price prediction project.

nodes.label: Random Forest
nodes.description: Classification and regression ensemble method used in housing price prediction analysis.

nodes.label: k-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN)
nodes.description: Classification algorithm used in housing price prediction project for comparative model analysis.

nodes.label: Software Engineering Methodologies
nodes.description: Coursework in software engineering principles, design patterns, and development practices.

nodes.label: Advanced Algorithms
nodes.description: Coursework in algorithm design, analysis, and optimization.

nodes.label: Database Systems
nodes.description: Coursework in SQL and ER modeling for database design and database management systems.

nodes.label: Data Analysis
nodes.description: Coursework in data analysis techniques using Python, Pandas, and R for statistical analysis.

nodes.label: Academic Excellence Recipient
nodes.description: Award recognition from University of Texas at Dallas for academic performance and achievement.

nodes.label: Legged Ground Robot
nodes.description: Robot platform for autonomous navigation and outdoor maintenance tasks in robotics capstone project.

nodes.label: LiDAR
nodes.description: Perception sensor used as input for robot perception in autonomous robotics navigation system.

nodes.label: Proprioception
nodes.description: Self-awareness and body-state sensor input for robot proprioceptive feedback in navigation system.

nodes.label: Edge-Following Behavior
nodes.description: Specialized navigation behavior training for robot to follow edges during outdoor maintenance tasks.

nodes.label: Reward Function Design
nodes.description: Custom reward function engineering and tuning for reinforcement learning policy training in robotics.

nodes.label: Dallas, TX
nodes.description: City where Freeman headquarters is located and where Imanol works. Also location of housing price analysis project.

nodes.label: Richardson, TX
nodes.description: Location of University of Texas at Dallas where Imanol is pursuing Computer Science degree.
